description: Wheel chocks missing or not properly placed against tires of docked trailer
visual_signals: no chocks visible at trailer wheels
chocks present but not contacting tire
single chock on only one side

description: Dock leveler plate is damaged, bent, or not level with trailer bed creating a trip hazard
visual_signals: bent leveler lip
visible gap between plate and trailer floor
leveler stuck in raised or lowered position

description: Excessive gap visible between trailer edge and dock face where workers could fall through
visual_signals: daylight visible between dock and trailer
gap wider than six inches
no bridge plate covering the gap

description: Overhead dock door has bent tracks, broken panels, or visibly damaged safety sensors
visual_signals: dented or cracked door panels
bent guide track
hanging or disconnected safety sensor wire

description: Insufficient or non-functional lighting at dock position reducing operator visibility
visual_signals: dark shadow zones at dock face
burned-out dock light fixture
no exterior light illuminating trailer interior

description: No visible separation between pedestrian walkway and forklift traffic lane in dock area
visual_signals: faded or missing floor markings
pedestrians and forklifts sharing same path
no bollards or barriers between zones

description: Dock bumpers are deteriorated, missing, or compressed exposing building wall to trailer impact
visual_signals: crumbled rubber bumper
exposed concrete at dock face
bumper hanging loose from mounting

description: Trailer ICC bar appears damaged, bent, or missing compromising rear underride protection
visual_signals: bent or sagging rear impact guard
missing ICC bar entirely
guard detached on one side

description: Dock edge lacks fall protection such as guardrails or safety chains when door is open and no trailer present
visual_signals: open dock door with no trailer backed in
no guardrail or safety bar across opening
unprotected drop at dock edge

description: Slip hazard from water, oil, snow, or debris accumulation on dock surface or approach ramp
visual_signals: wet sheen on dock floor
oil stain near dock edge
loose debris in traffic path

description: Vehicle restraint system not engaged or malfunctioning while trailer is being loaded or unloaded
visual_signals: restraint arm in raised or disengaged position with trailer at dock
red signal light illuminated indicating restraint not locked
restraint hook not contacting trailer ICC bar

description: Dock communication signal lights missing, non-functional, or showing incorrect status for current dock activity
visual_signals: no red or green signal light visible at dock position
both interior and exterior lights showing green simultaneously
burned-out or dark signal light housing

description: Dock safety signage missing or illegible including capacity ratings, trailer inspection checklists, and operational procedures
visual_signals: blank wall where capacity placard should be mounted
faded or unreadable safety instruction sign at dock face
missing trailer inspection checklist posting near dock door

description: No-pedestrian zone markings absent or obscured in active dock traffic areas
visual_signals: no warning signage prohibiting pedestrian access in forklift zones
faded or worn no-pedestrian floor stencils
missing keep-clear hatching at dock approaches

description: Edge-of-dock leveler lip is excessively worn, cracked, or has damaged hinges reducing safe load transition
visual_signals: thin or rounded leveler lip edge from wear
cracked or broken hinge at leveler lip pivot point
leveler lip that does not extend fully or sit flat on trailer bed

description: Pit leveler showing hydraulic fluid leak, damaged control panel, or non-functional lip roller
visual_signals: hydraulic fluid pooling in leveler pit or on dock floor
cracked or missing buttons on leveler control panel
lip roller seized or missing from leveler front edge

description: Dock seal or shelter is damaged with compressed foam, torn fabric, or gaps allowing weather infiltration
visual_signals: compressed or flattened foam pads on dock shelter sides
ripped or hanging dock seal fabric
daylight visible around trailer through dock shelter gaps

description: Hazmat placarding on trailer does not match load contents or placards are missing, damaged, or improperly displayed
visual_signals: empty placard holder on trailer carrying placarded materials
faded or illegible hazmat diamond placard
placard class number not matching shipping documents posted at dock

description: Forklift operating at excessive speed in dock area or failing to sound horn at intersections and blind corners
visual_signals: forklift moving with load elevated above travel height
forklift approaching blind intersection without stopping
blurred motion indicating high speed near dock edge

description: Forklift operator not wearing seat belt or restraint while operating on dock or loading ramp
visual_signals: seat belt hanging loose alongside forklift seat
operator visible without lap belt buckled
restraint bar in raised position during forklift operation

description: Trailer floor shows visible rot, holes, delamination, or structural weakness that could collapse under forklift weight
visual_signals: broken or splintered trailer floor boards visible from dock
holes or daylight visible through trailer floor
delaminated or sagging plywood decking inside trailer

description: Fire extinguisher missing, expired, or improperly mounted at or near dock positions
visual_signals: empty fire extinguisher bracket on dock wall
extinguisher with expired inspection tag or missing pin
fire extinguisher on floor instead of mounted at accessible height

description: Emergency eye wash station missing, obstructed, or not maintained near dock battery charging areas
visual_signals: no eye wash station visible in battery charging area near dock
eye wash station blocked by stored materials or equipment
dust covers on eye wash nozzles appearing unused or deteriorated

description: Dock area housekeeping deficiency with accumulated shrink wrap, banding material, or loose debris creating hazards
visual_signals: loose shrink wrap strewn across dock floor
piles of cut banding straps near dock positions
scattered pallet fragments and packaging debris in traffic lanes

description: Loading dock drainage system clogged, damaged, or allowing standing water accumulation on dock surface or apron
visual_signals: standing water pooled on dock apron or approach ramp
debris-clogged trench drain grate at dock threshold
trench drain cover missing or broken exposing open channel

description: Temperature-controlled dock missing or damaged strip curtains, rapid-close doors, or cold chain transition barriers
visual_signals: missing or torn strip curtain panels at refrigerated dock opening
rapid-close door stuck in open position
frost buildup or fogging at unprotected temperature transition zone

description: Trailer landing gear in poor condition with damaged crank handle, cracked pad, or gear not fully raised while trailer is docked
visual_signals: bent or missing landing gear crank handle
cracked or broken landing gear foot pad
landing gear legs partially lowered while trailer is at dock

description: Personnel in dock traffic areas without required PPE including high-visibility vests and steel-toe footwear
visual_signals: workers in dock area without high-visibility vest or clothing
personnel wearing sneakers or open-toe shoes on active dock
dock workers lacking hard hats in areas with overhead loading activity

description: Dock approach ramp surface is deteriorated, uneven, or lacks anti-slip treatment creating forklift and pedestrian hazards
visual_signals: cracked or spalled concrete on dock approach ramp
smooth worn surface with no anti-slip texture on ramp
uneven transition or lip between ramp and dock floor

description: Trailer not properly centered at dock position with rear wheels off dock approach or trailer angled creating unsafe loading geometry
visual_signals: trailer backed in at visible angle to dock face
rear trailer wheels off the edge of dock approach pad
large uneven gap on one side between trailer and dock seal
